description: CompositionBlue and white check shirt with grey accents made of 100% cotton, has a spread collar with a buttoned front placket, full sleeves with buttoned cuffs and mid-sleeve buttoned flaps, embroidered branding above the flap pocket on the left chest and a curved hemFitRegularWash careMachine wash at 40 degreesWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachTumble dry normal or line dryWarm ironCrafted from soft cotton and cuts that offer a flattering fit, this casual check shirt from Locomotiove offers exemplary comfort and is sure to become a wardrobe favourite. Either button the sleeves at the cuffs or roll them up and secure them with the mid-sleeve flaps for a more casual style. Pair it with jeans and sneakers.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
